Name: What Books Press
Genre: an imprint of Los Angeles’s Glass Table Collective, was founded in 2009. With its genre-bending list of bilingual poetry, eco-fabulist science fiction, magic journalism, collaborative texts, and hybrid and graphic narrative, WBP remains committed to new, innovative, and underrepresented writing that challenges both formal boundaries and the pressing social and political issues of our time. All WBP books feature cover art by the renowned painter, printmaker, and performance artist, Gronk Nicandro.
